title: schiedea attenuata
intro: Schiedea attenuata, also known as Ma'o hau hele, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. This flowering plant is a shrub that grows up to 1 meter tall, producing small yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Schiedea attenuata include wound healing, skin conditions, and immune system support, and it can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
